report_name: Ransomware Attack by 'The Gentlemen' Halts Production at Mackay Sugar, Australia's Second-Largest Producer

threat_actors.name: The Gentlemen
threat_actors.description: A ransomware group that conducted a cyberattack against Mackay Sugar, forcing the shutdown of at least two of its cane-processing mills in Queensland, Australia.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The Gentlemen threat actor deployed ransomware to encrypt servers and workstations at Mackay Sugar, leading to a disruption of business systems that manage logistics, scheduling, and processing, which was sufficient to halt physical operations.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: The attackers likely used the vssadmin.exe utility to delete volume shadow copies, preventing system recovery from local backups, as suggested by the command line pattern 'vssadmin.exe delete shadows'.

malware.name: The Gentlemen Ransomware
malware.description: A ransomware variant used by 'The Gentlemen' group in the attack against Mackay Sugar. It is believed to append the '.gentlemen' extension to encrypted files.

tools.name: vssadmin
tools.description: The vssadmin.exe tool was likely used by the attackers to delete volume shadow copies to inhibit system recovery.

identities.name: Mackay Sugar
identities.description: Australia's second-largest raw sugar producer, which was the victim of a ransomware attack by 'The Gentlemen' group. The attack forced the company to shut down at least two of its three cane-processing mills and halt harvesting operations.

indicators.name: The Gentlemen Ransomware File Extension
indicators.pattern:
title: The Gentlemen Ransomware File Extension
id: 2b8c1f9a-3d1e-4b7c-8a5d-9f6e2c4b0a1d
status: experimental
description: Detects files created with the .gentlemen extension, which is associated with The Gentlemen ransomware group.
references:
  - https://www.securityweek.com/ransomware-attack-shuts-down-mills-of-australias-second-largest-sugar-producer/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-15
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: critical
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.gentlemen'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of files with the '.gentlemen' extension, indicating encryption by The Gentlemen ransomware.

indicators.name: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
id: f8a1b2c3-d4e5-4f6a-b7c8-d9e0f1a2b3c4
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common ransomware technique to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://www.securityweek.com/ransomware-attack-shuts-down-mills-of-australias-second-largest-sugar-producer/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-15
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.defense_evasion
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects command-line execution of 'vssadmin.exe' to delete shadow copies, a technique used to prevent system recovery.
